description: Official Spanish agricultural machinery registrations; useful for Iberia demand and installed-base trend.
bestUseCase: Use monthly avances and annual reports.
dataProvided: Spanish agricultural machinery registrations by type.

name: FTMTA Statistics Service
description: Irish new and used tractor, telehandler and UTV registration data; important after Kramp/Genfitt expansion.
bestUseCase: Add as Ireland-specific demand proxy.
dataProvided: Irish tractor and telehandler registrations.

name: KBA Germany Tractor Registrations
description: German tractor registration data from the Federal Motor Transport Authority; core DACH demand proxy.
bestUseCase: Use KBA new registrations and/or VDMA formatted newsletter.

name: Copa-Cogeca News & Policy
description: Farmer and cooperative policy sentiment; helps capture farmer fears, protests and policy issues early.
bestUseCase: Keyword-watch CAP, Ukraine, input costs, farmer income, protests.
dataProvided: Farmer policy positions, income concerns, CAP reform updates.

name: EC DG AGRI Short-term Outlook
description: Official short-term outlook for EU ag commodities, production, prices and income drivers.
bestUseCase: Add to quarterly macro/ag market deck.

name: JRC MARS Crop Monitoring Bulletin
description: Crop condition, yield forecasts and weather impacts that drive farmer cash flow and seasonal parts demand.
bestUseCase: High-value weather-to-demand leading indicator.
dataProvided: Crop condition maps, yield forecasts, weather anomalies.

name: European Drought Observatory (EDO)
description: Drought maps/time series for Europe; high relevance for crop, forestry and landscaping stress.
bestUseCase: Use EDO/GDO maps and downloadable data.
dataProvided: European drought indicators and maps.

name: FAO Food Price Index
description: Global food commodity price trend and farmer revenue proxy.
bestUseCase: Monthly macro signal for ag purchasing power.
dataProvided: Global food commodity price indices by category.

name: CECE Annual Economic Report
description: Annual state of the European construction equipment sector; market size, orders, sentiment and policy.
bestUseCase: Add exact CECE report page.
dataProvided: European construction equipment market size, orders, OEM rankings.

name: HCOB / S&P Global Country Construction PMIs
description: High-frequency activity, new orders, employment and supplier delivery-time signal by market.
bestUseCase: Track eurozone, Germany, France, Italy, UK.
dataProvided: Monthly construction PMI by country — activity, orders, employment.

name: EC Construction Confidence Indicator
description: Monthly harmonised construction confidence and economic sentiment by country.
bestUseCase: Use sectoral confidence indicators as demand leading indicators.
dataProvided: Monthly construction business confidence by EU country.

name: Eurostat Building Permits Monthly
description: Leading indicator for future construction activity, especially building cycle.
bestUseCase: Exact dataset teiis550.
dataProvided: Monthly building permits by country and building type.

name: Eurostat Production in Construction
description: Official construction output trend by country.
bestUseCase: Use for market dashboards.
dataProvided: Monthly construction production index by country.

name: ERA Market Report / RentalTracker
description: Equipment rental market activity, fleet utilisation, capex and sentiment; rental drives parts demand.
bestUseCase: Monitor ERA market reports and RentalTracker articles.
dataProvided: Equipment rental market size, fleet utilisation, rental rates.

name: Caterpillar Retail Statistics
description: Dealer-reported retail sales for construction/resource equipment by region; rare high-frequency OEM demand signal.
bestUseCase: Track EAME construction industries retail statistics.
dataProvided: Quarterly dealer retail sales by region and segment.

name: Volvo Construction Equipment / Volvo Group Reports
description: European construction equipment order intake, deliveries, services and dealer inventory commentary.
bestUseCase: Monitor Volvo CE press and Volvo Group reports.
dataProvided: Quarterly CE order intake, deliveries, services revenue, dealer inventory.

name: Wacker Neuson Group Investor Relations
description: Compact construction equipment and light machinery; overlaps small earth-moving and landscaping.
bestUseCase: High relevance to Kramp small earth-moving focus.
dataProvided: Compact equipment order intake, revenue, margin by region.

name: Manitou Group Investor Relations
description: Telehandlers and handling equipment across construction, agriculture and industry.
bestUseCase: Cross-industry machinery demand source.
dataProvided: Telehandler and handling equipment orders, deliveries, revenue.

name: Doosan Bobcat Investor Relations
description: Compact equipment, skid steers, loaders, excavators and attachments; relevant to small earth-moving.
bestUseCase: Monitor compact equipment demand and attachments.

name: EGMF Market Survey

bestUseCase: Priority source if access can be obtained.

name: ELCA European Landscape Contractors Association

name: BGL German Landscape Association

name: World Bank Commodity Markets / Pink Sheet

name: Eurostat Energy Prices

name: ANSEMAT Spain Machinery Market Reports

name: PZPM / CEP Poland Agricultural Tractor Registrations

name: EC Farm Accountancy Data Network / FSDN

name: USDA WASDE

name: AHDB Market Intelligence

name: NFU Farmer Confidence Survey

name: Teagasc Situation and Outlook

name: Wageningen Economic Research Agrimatie

name: Off-Highway Research Europe

name: Eurostat Forestry Database
